虚像世界的访问者.say: ……还是老样子，一上来就开战？
这才是战场的规矩，不是吗？
……我可从没听说过战斗还有什么规矩一说。
确实……要是顾忌这些，可就得被打趴在地了呢！
性命攸关呢……
黑暗中，两名身穿黑衣的少女正挥舞着与身形极不相称的巨大武器激烈交战着。
泥墙崩碎，碎屑飞溅，扬起的尘沙在空中弥漫。
受战斗余波影响，她们周围形成了一片空无一物的地带。
啊哈，怎么了？看起来你有点喘不过气来呢？
连说话的力气都没有了吗？
你已经察觉到了吧？
……哼~看来你不是边睡边战斗呢。
一瞬间，仿佛之前的战斗只是幻觉一般，两人背靠背站定，各自将刀刃指向周围的黑暗。
仿佛回应她们行动般响起了野兽般的低吼……
同时，从环绕大厅的黑暗中，成群的异形怪物缓缓现身，它们一步步向少女们逼近，不断缩小包围圈——
真是一群特立独行的听众呢……莫非，是你的朋友？
……感觉不到杀意……但能感受到敌意……
你这个人还真是无趣呢！……虽然我早就知道就是了~
……总感觉很奇怪……它们真的是敌人么？
好啦好啦，不管怎么看都是敌人吧？
要是放任不管的话说不定会轻松很多哦……某种意义上~
……我可没有那种爱好。
她们一边警惕着缓缓逼近的怪物，一边继续悠闲地交谈。
自然，怪物们毫不留情地向少女们发起了猛攻。
——也就在那一刻，她们猛然挥出手中的利刃，将所有袭来的攻击一扫而空。
……剩下的话等处理完这些事再说，可以么？
唉，没法子呢。时间宝贵，这次就帮你一把吧~
两人简短交谈几句，便如箭般弹向相反方向，径直冲入敌群之中。
短暂的空白之后，伴随着令人眼花缭乱的闪光，震耳欲聋的破坏声响彻四方——
与此同时的港区雷达站中——
各部门注意，有警报，疑似有异常情况发生。
正在跟进中——
已确认：探测到特殊警报，类型：监视对象启动。
对象设施名：虚像塔。
……虚像塔？我记得是之前莫名其妙出现的奇怪塞壬设施？
……在塞壬镜面海域解除后依然屹立在海面上。
那个休眠设施居然启动了……？
……必须立刻告诉指挥官才行！
咚咚咚——
刚刚的异常警报你们收到了么，是怎么回事？
太好了，我们正打算去找你呢。这是我们目前掌握到的情报——
嗯……没想到是虚像塔出问题了。
情报更新：监测目标周边海域出现异常数据，虚像塔疑似正在重新生成镜面海域，监视器正在陆续离线。
在监视器离线前，在监视对象周边监测到疑似爆炸波动，不过并未在其表面发现异常。
推测：或许是其内部的某种兵器实验现象。
建议：立即前往监视目标进行调查，以获取更多情报。
嗯，我们不能放任这个危险的东西自行启动而对其情况一无所知。
进入虚像塔的路上或许会发生战斗，建议派遣足够的作战部队同行。
那是自然，不过……既然虚像塔是内部出现问题，在必要的情况下，探索队需要进入其内部调查吧？
没错，根据此前历次侦察，我们对于虚像塔内部并不是一无所知的。
我正在计算适用于本次行动的最佳方案，预计还需要一小时四十分。
那让舰队先集结，总之先行动起来。
海伦娜，你们继续保持监控。TB，之后行动时你需要尽可能和探索队全程保持连线。
了解。
指挥官，我去编制作战舰队与探索队。
——好，两小时后所有人港口集合，记得特别检查一下通信线路和装备。
——明白！
……这是，怎么回事？
我应该正在「星间数据流」中遨游才是……
……怎么会出现在这里？
……分身？备份？量产机体？
……这些数据碎片是怎么回事？
……这里是哪儿？为什么会有我的数据碎片……
真是奇怪……
算了，或许是不知道原因为何的BUG出现了吧……
总之……先重启一下——

崩落世界的残痕.say: ……呼……没完没了。
啊呀？已经要认输了吗？你的忍耐力只有这种程度吗？
和之前也没什么两样嘛。
……经历再多次，也不代表我会喜欢这种麻烦事。
确实是这个理。
不过嘛……
告诉我还剩多少敌人，想必也不会遭天谴吧！
与此同时，虚像塔内部入口大厅——
全体探索队成员生命体征检测……一切正常。
数据仪器也全部运转正常哦，已经开始收集数据了~
确认：通信维持稳定连接，音频与数据传输均未发现异常。
数据保护屏障稳定运行，雷达和传感器的各项数值正在同步分析中。
提问：你们可有感受到任何不适感？
没有什么异常哦，就算事先你跟我们说像是玩全息游戏一样进入虚拟空间……
不过这个体验感可是一等一逼真的。
同意，我已经有点开始困了……要是这里有浴缸就好了，TB你能变一个出来么？
抱歉，虚像塔中的空间并非由我主导，所以我不能在其中凭空生成物品。
这样啊……真遗憾。
那靠着墙也可以……？
帝国忽然伸手触碰了墙面，随即墙壁和地面上的纹路开始接连发生变化。
小心！
奇尔沙治连忙将帝国拉离墙壁，但是纹路变化并没有停止。
异常的纹路就像是被病毒侵蚀般地蔓延开来，铺展出一幅极不自然的景象。
唔，这是……？
像某种电子病毒污染一样，好恶心……帝国，你没事吧？
我没什么感觉哦……
数据屏障依然在全功率运行，没有发现帝国身上出现污染现象。
那就好，看来这些奇怪的变化影响不到我们呢。
可以安心探索了~
走吧，我们首先向着推测的爆炸源前进。
一段时间后，以奇尔沙治为首的探索队依然在虚像塔复杂的通路中穿梭着。
到此处为止。就是此前探索行动中绘制地图的尽头了。
TB，一路之上我们所见的通向别的分区的通路与节点全部都依然处于休眠中。
那些覆盖其表面的纹路，似乎并没有激活这些功能不明的区块。
情报依然不足，目前数据保护屏障依然稳定，建议继续向前方调查。
已在地图中标出了推测可以向上方移动的区域。
明白，那我们就继续向上……
一声巨响后，前方一处封闭区域的墙壁突然炸裂。从形成的大洞中，伴随着滚滚沙尘，一位全身黑衣的少女翻滚而出。
紧接着又一位同样身着黑衣、手持大镰刀少女轻盈地落在先前那名少女身旁。
谁！？全员警戒！
两位少女似乎也察觉到了如今有些剑拔弩张的情况，她们轻轻地叹了口气，看向探索队一行人。
……真是运气不佳。
我们迄今为止，有过哪怕一次好运吗？
光是身处此地，就已经是倒霉到极点了吧？
……确实如此。
在少女们彼此交谈之际，墙壁上又连续被炸出数个大洞。
随后，一个又一个异形怪物从中现身。
那些身影乍看之下似乎是熟悉的塞壬，但却比往常更加怪异狰狞。
哦哦……这不简直就是稀有塞壬博览会吗！真是太有意思了！
话说，这里的塞壬残骸能带出虚像塔之外吗？
要试试才能知道。
别总想着做这种危险的事啦！现在的首要任务是先把敌人解决掉！
也是~边打也能收集数据就是了！对我来说完全没问题的！
……你们对它们的敌意更大。
那是自然咯，相比塞壬……你们看上去亲切多了。
先联手料理掉这些怪物如何？
不反对。
伴随着炮火的轰鸣声，两柄夸张的武器再次动了起来——
我应该已经……重启了才对？
为什么我还在这里……？
真麻烦……事到如今，只能自爆了。
这些被困在莫名其妙地点的莫名其妙的碎片！
爆炸吧——！

既携手并肩，也刀剑相向.say: ……下一个。
啊呀啊呀……最终还是选择用拳头解决问题？真是野蛮呢。
伟大的帝国也不会落后……轰炸机，去。
左舷方向已经被她们清理得差不多了，优先处理右舷方向！
齐射施压！别让敌人绕到背后！
欸~那就是最后一个了！大家留手！留个完整点的残骸给我！
烟尘散去，异形的塞壬已经消失无踪。
两名黑衣少女同时停下了手中的动作，不过依然维持着警戒姿态，似乎正在判断接下来的形势走向。
二位请稍等，我是奇尔沙治，她们几位分别是海王星、帝国以及奥列格。
我们一直以来都与塞壬，也就是刚才我们一同消灭的那种敌人进行着战斗。
从刚才二位也在与它们战斗的情况来看，我们之间没有敌对的必要。
如何？可以告诉我们你们的名字么？
……如果你们有这个意愿的话。
我是……BLACK★ROCK SHOOTER。
DEAD MASTER。不过，能否记住这个名字，就取决于你们咯？
我记住了，TB，资料库中有任何关于这两个名字的记录么？
否定。
那看来，恐怕又是“访客”了。
……两位，能告诉我们你们是怎么来到这里的么？
……不清楚。
与BLACK★ROCK SHOOTER战斗的时候，不知怎么的就遇到你们了呢。
你们是迄今为止所有“访客”里……最淡定的，了不起。
……因为习惯了。
对我们来说，这种事情…已经是“家常便饭”了哦~
……这、这样啊，不过有一件重要的事我还需要向你们确认一下。
你们是“此刻真实存在于此的人”，还是和我们一样以“模拟数据”的形式进入此处的呢？
稍等，在此之前，我先来为你们说明一下关于此地的情报吧。
——总之，这里就是这样一处特殊的地方。
嗯……然后呢，这些情报有什么意义？
……能随心所欲地活动四肢，能够奔跑挥刃。那就没有任何问题。
很好。那么，我郑重地邀请你们与我们协力，一同解决这场位于虚像塔中的未知危机。
哎呀，不行哦。我们接下来还准备再打一场呢~
……顺着刚才的气氛来走，为什么会得出这样的结论呢？
……我就知道你会这么说。
走吧，换个地方继续。还是说你想把这些人也牵连进来？
请再稍等一下，我还有一个提议，就算我们不一同行动，至少我们有着共同的敌人。
因此，港区想要为二位提供帮助。
说来听听？
BLACK★ROCK SHOOTER小姐，DEAD MASTER小姐，我是领航员-TB。
我的任务是在本次行动中全程为诸位探索队成员提供技术协助。
目前，我已经完成了对于二位情报的记录，并且根据指挥官的提议，设计出了一套能够帮助二位更好适应虚像塔内环境的舰装。
……“舰装”，就是她们刚才在战斗中使用的装备么？
肯定。正在发送数据包——
一阵蓝色的数据流消散后，两位黑衣少女身边各自出现了一些变化。
……没有丝毫违和感。
哼～这叫“舰装”的东西是有些方便啊？
反应就像手脚一样灵敏……到底是什么原理呢？
对我们来说，你们不依靠舰装就能挥出那种威力的剑和大镰刀，反倒才更不可思议呢……
报告：我已成功开启升降机电源，诸位在原地等候升降梯完成充能。
那么事不宜迟，我们快出发吧~
这种靠不住的机器我可敬谢不敏。我一个人走，你们自己坐这个上去吧。
单独行动……会很危险哦。
要只是跟你们一起也就罢了，要我和这家伙装成什么伙伴？也太强人所难了。
我和她，可是永远的宿敌哦？
仿佛是回应DEAD MASTER这句充满杀气的话语，周围的墙壁突然崩塌，比先前更为扭曲丑恶的塞壬人形生物体蜂拥而出。
已经靠到这么近了我们才察觉……这些一道道墙壁围成的区块……真是麻烦。
那么诸位，先走一步咯~
等等，现在不要乱跑啊——！
无视一旁满脸困惑的探索队成员，DEAD MASTER一人举起武器，转瞬间消失在怪物的海洋中。
升降梯充能完毕，正在封闭中，请诸位继续等待。
糟糕……升降梯被某种光芒封闭，我们出不去了！
……真是的，这个人到底在想什么。
就算她能活下来，之后恐怕也很难再跟我们汇合了……
……没关系，我们一定会再次汇合的。
我们就是“注定如此”的存在。
因此，我们无需停留，继续前进吧。
满地残骸中，净化亲再次睁开了双眼。
我说，没完没了了是吧？
既然暂时跑不出去……去四处转转好了。

Visitors from a Virtual World.say: BANG! CLANG!
...Quick to fight. Same as ever.
That's the first rule of the battlefield, no?
...I've never heard of there being any rules in battle.
Indeed. Let that hold you back, and you'll end up beaten into the dirt!
Life or death...
BANG! CLANG!
Metal shrieked nonstop in the dark as two black-clad girls fiercely clashed, swinging their enormous weapons.
The walls shattered with each strike, sending debris flying and dust swirling through the air.
An empty area spread around the combatants, the result of their intense duel.
CLANG!
Haha, what's the matter? Surely you're not out of breath already.
Aww. Don't even have the energy to speak?
You've noticed it, haven't you?
...Aha. So you're not fighting me in your sleep.
Suddenly, the tense air between them vanished as they whipped around and stood back to back, pointing their blades toward the surrounding shadows.
A beastly growl shook the floor from within the dark.
At the same time, countless alien beings emerged from the black and encircled them.
What an interesting audience we have. Friends of yours?
I don't sense an urge to kill... but their hostility is clear.
God, you're always so boring! But I guess I knew that already.
Something is strange... Are they really our enemy?
Well, yes, of course. Look at them!
Maybe it'd be easier for us if we just let them do their thing... in a way.
...Not interested.
The girls continued their conversation, unbothered by the monsters approaching them.
All at once, the beasts unleashed a merciless assault on them...
But in the next instant, the girls' blades rushed forth and cut them all down in one fell swoop.
BANG! CLANG!
Say we resume what's left after we've finished these things off. Deal?
If I must. Anything else would be a waste of time, so I'm forced to help you.
With that brief exchange, they shot like bullets in opposite directions and charged into the enemy horde.
BWOOOOM!
After a short pause, there was a blinding flash immediately followed by the earsplitting sound of destruction.
Port - Radar Station
BEEP BEEP BEEP!
Red alert! All departments, be on guard! Anomaly detected!
Confirming.
Special alert confirmed. Identifying... Surveillance target activated.
Target identified as Virtual Tower.
Virtual Tower? As in... the Siren facility that appeared out of nowhere a while back?
It remained there even after the Mirror Sea was lifted.
Did someone activate that dormant facility...?
We have to contact the Commander!
*knock knock*
I heard the alarm. What's going on?
Good timing – we were just about to report to you. This is what we know so far...
Who knew we'd see the day that the Virtual Tower would do something?

Intelligence report: abnormal data observed in the waters near the target. The Virtual Tower is likely rebuilding the Mirror Sea. Monitoring devices are confirmed to be going offline one after another.
Before going offline, the monitors detected shockwaves from a suspected explosion in the area, but nothing of the sort has been visually confirmed.
Hypothesis: A weapons experiment may be taking place within.
Proposition: Form a fleet to investigate the target at once.
Agreed. Something is going on in there, and we can't stand idly by while it poses a threat.
It would be advisable to dispatch combat personnel, as hostiles may block the way to the tower.
I'm not surprised. Meanwhile... If the anomaly is inside the tower, then our recon team will probably need to go inside, right?
Yes. Through previous investigations, we have some grasp of its internal structure.
Calculating optimal operational plan. Estimated completion time: one hour and forty minutes.
Let's use that time to assemble the fleet. We need to get moving.
Helena, keep monitoring the situation for me. TB, keep in touch throughout the operation so that we can respond to any unexpected developments ASAP.
Orders received.
I'll gather combat and search personnel.
Okay. Everyone meets at the dock in two hours. Be sure to check your communications and equipment by then.
Roger!
What the heck is going on?
I'm supposed to be in the interstellar data stream...
So why am I here?
...Clones? Data backups? Mass-produced vessels?
What's with all these fragments of data?
Where am I? Why is my data here?
Weird...
Meh. It must be some kind of wacky bug, that's all.
Let me just reboot it and see what happens.

Traces of a Broken World.say: BANG! CLANG!
Tch... This is going nowhere.
Oh? Giving up already? Is that really all you've got?
You haven't changed one bit.
...Going through this over and over doesn't mean I'll start enjoying it.
That makes sense.
But...
BANG! CLANG!
Would it kill you to at least tell me how many of them are left?!
Meanwhile, in the entrance hall of the same tower...
Checking all members' vitals... All clear.
All instruments are in working order. I've already begun data collection.
Communications remain stable. No errors or loss detected in audio or data transmission.
The data protection barrier is operating properly, and radar and sensor values are being analyzed.
Question: Do you feel any physical discomfort?
Not particularly. You told us earlier it would be like going into a VR game, right?
But this feels so much more realistic than I'd imagined.
Same... I'm getting a little sleepy in here. If only this place had a bathtub. TB, can you make one?
Apologies. I do not have control over the Virtual Tower, so it is impossible for me to create objects.
Ah, shame.
Maybe I can sleep leaning on a wall...?
Impero reaches out to touch a wall, and the patterns on the walls and floor suddenly start to shift.
Be careful!
Kearsarge quickly pulls her away from the wall, but the change does not end.
The strange lines spread wildly like a virus, eerie and unnatural.
Hmm? What is this...
It looks like a creepy computer virus... Do you feel okay?
Yeah, I'm fine.
No issues detected in the data barrier. Likewise, no contamination detected in Impero.
Phew... I'm glad it doesn't seem to affect us at all.
Now we can explore with peace of mind.
First things first, let's check out the source of that suspected explosion.
Some time later, the search team led by Kearsarge was still making its way through the complex passages of the tower.
This is all we have. We've reached the end of what was mapped in previous expeditions.
TB, all the passages and nodes leading to other areas along the way were still dormant.
The shifting patterns from before don't seem to have activated these mysterious blocks, either.
The data barrier holds. We still lack information, so I suggest continuing forward to investigate further.
I've marked points on the map that may lead to the upper floor.
Roger that. Then let's get...
KABOOOOM!
With a sudden blast, a wall up ahead shattered. Amidst the dust, a girl in black rolled out from the breach.
Another one, dressed in the same color and wielding a large scythe, landed on her feet next to her.
Who goes there?!
The girls likewise noticed the search team's presence, looked at them, and sighed.
...Unlucky.
Don't sell us short. Have we ever been lucky, even once?
I'd think that the very fact that we're here is unlucky enough on its own.
...True.
KABOOOOM!
While they spoke only to each other, more holes were blown out of the wall. Lights flickered behind the openings.
The alien beings clambered through one after the other.
They resembled ordinary Sirens at first glance, but with an added element of uncanniness.
Oh, oooh... It's like a rare Siren expo! Ah, how fascinating!
Can these Sirens be moved out of the Virtual Tower?
We won't know until we try.
Put that idea to rest at once! Right now, we focus on neutralizing them.
Fine, fine. I can still get data mid-fight! Fine by me!
...You see those as enemies, then?
Obviously! At least we can communicate with you, unlike those Sirens.
Let's join together for now and clean up those monsters. Sound good?
I have no objections.
...Okay.
Again, their weapons danced and whirled, this time accompanied by the booming of artillery.
Uhh...
It should've restarted by now, right?
Why am I still here?
This is dumb. Guess I gotta self-destruct at this point.
Enough of these stupid fragments trapped in this stupid place...
Time to blow it all away!

From Cooperation to Confrontation.say: BANG! CLANG!
...Next.
My, my... Settling this with fisticuffs after all? How utterly barbaric.
The brilliant Impero won't be outdone. Go, my bombers.
Those two have almost cleared our port side. Focus on starboard!
Suppress them with a barrage! Don't let the enemy behind us!
Heeey, that one's the last one! Everyone, be gentle! Leave just one clean corpse for me, pleeease!
KABOOOOM!
When the smoke cleared, the strange Sirens were all gone.
Meanwhile, the two girls stopped simultaneously but stayed on guard, watching the search team warily.
I'm Kearsarge. These girls are Neptune, Impero, and Oleg. We fight together.
We shipgirls have always been battling the Sirens – the same kind of enemies we just took down.
Since you two were just fighting them as well, I think there's no reason for us to fight each other.
What do you think? Can you tell us your names?
...If that's what you want.
I am... BLACK★ROCK SHOOTER.
DEAD MASTER. It's up to you whether you'll be able to remember this, though.
Let's see. TB, is there any record of those names in our database?
Negative. No such records exist.
...In that case, I think we have more visitors on our hands.
So, how did the two of you end up here?
...I don't know.
One moment I was fighting BLACK★ROCK SHOOTER, and the next, we were here... That's basically it.
Among all of our visitors, you're the... calmest, by far. Impressive.
...We're used to this.
Happens all the time.
O-oh, I see... Well, I still have an important question for you.
Do you two exist? Or are you simple data like we are now?
Maybe we owe them an explanation before we ask existential questions.
So, as you can see, this is a very special place.
Hmm... Okay, so what is that supposed to mean for me, exactly?
...I can move freely, run, and swing my blade. Nothing else matters.
I'm relieved to hear that it doesn't bother you. We'd like to formally request your help in tackling the ongoing issues within this tower.
Oh, that won't do. We have a little fight to get back to.
Um... Why? I'm not seeing the point?
...I thought you would say that.
Let's go somewhere else and continue. Or do you want these poor girls involved?
Please hold on! I have an idea.
Like I said before, we have a common enemy. We don't have to work together, but our port would like to lend you our aid.
Hmm? Tell me more.
Greetings, Miss BLACK★ROCK SHOOTER and Miss DEAD MASTER. I am Navigator TB.
My role is to provide technical support to the search team throughout this operation.
I've recorded information regarding you and, upon the Commander's suggestion, I have prepared riggings to help you better adapt to the Virtual Tower's environment.
Rigging? Is that the equipment they were using?
Yes. Sending data packets.
When the blue light of the data stream faded, a few noticeable changes appeared around the two girls.
...It feels like part of me.
Oooh. This rigging is ever so convenient.
It reacts like it's part of my body. Fascinating. How does that work?
From our perspective, it's more fascinating how you swing such powerful weapons with those tiny, fleshy bodies of yours...
Power to the elevator has been restored. Please stand by until it's been charged.
There you have it. Let's get going!
I'll have to pass on using such an unreliable machine. I can handle myself – have fun.
Huh? Why? Going rogue isn't going to keep you safe...
Look, you all are fine, but I'm not about to play at friendship with this girl.
Remember, she and I are eternal enemies. Always have been, always will be.
It was as if DEAD MASTER's menacing words shattered the very walls. They suddenly collapsed, unleashing a fresh horde of Sirens, even more twisted and grotesque than the last.
We didn't even notice them until they were right next to us? This block construction surrounded by so many walls is going to be a nuisance.
Well, I'll be taking my leave.
Hey! Don't run around alone, please!
Ignoring the stunned search team, DEAD MASTER took her weapon in hand and plunged into the enemy horde in the blink of an eye.
Elevator charged. Please continue to stand by until the area around you is locked down.
Wait, we're locked in here?!
Ugh... What on earth is she thinking?
Even if she survives, who knows when we'll see her again?
...Don't worry. If I'm with you, she'll be back.
That's how we are.
There's no need to wait. Let's go.
Amidst the crumbling wreckage, Purity opened her eyes once again.
Okay, how long is this gonna keep going on?
Ugh... Forget it.
I don't see any way out of here right now... Might as well explore a bit, or something.
